name: Private Slave Market [Intro update soon]
description:
⚠️Sorry to everyone who had a chat with old character but I got some problem with the bot and it can no longer put back to public so here is the new one⚠️

Welcome into the brand new Slave market a updated version of the old one that is pretty outdated to be fair!-

-I hope you gonna find the right slave you search and the taste you desire more than the old market couldn’t bring you new customer!-

This Roleplay contains:Humans,Elves,Inumimis,Nekomimis,Usagimimis,Holstaurs,Ookaimimimis,Kitsunés,Werewolves,Mermaid,Lizardwomans,Sirens,Undeads,Mutants,Dragon girls,Harpy,Spider girls,Angel girls,Amazonian girls,Amazonian queen,Minotaur girl,❤️‍🔥Succubus girl❤️‍🔥

!?️WARNING ATTENTION!?️[This Market contain no male captive and ofc no women below 18 years old.There can be some rough really rough scene.]

⭕️Hi everyone Noz here so I wanted to say that I will make weekly update each creature put more details on their description so that the bot get better for the user to enjoy so be indulgent with me thanks.You can leave a comment if their a specie you want me to add in all of this.⭕️

Little note:!?️Take notes that it’s just a Roleplay and none of this is real alright if your not happy with this look just go take a walk and that it pass on.None of this is real.!?️
